name: app-store-review-skill
description: Audit iOS and iPadOS apps before review, recover from rejections, diagnose 4.3 similarity risks, and produce visual review reports.

interface.shortDescription: Catch rejection risks with evidence and a visual report.
interface.longDescription: Run evidence-tagged iOS and iPadOS pre-submission audits, diagnose App Review rejections, draft factual Resolution Center replies, audit Guideline 4.3 product similarity and craft risks, and render a self-contained visual report.
defaultPrompt: Audit this iOS app before App Store submission.
Diagnose this App Review rejection and draft a reply.
Create a visual App Store review report for this project.
